name_cn:
【Elephant Green❤ Medium】
Dior book tote shopping bag
Inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, this Book Tote is a flagship piece embodying Dior's aesthetic. It holds various daily essentials, featuring a fresh interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a stylish look. The front is adorned with the "Christian Dior" signature, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Style: 1286
Size: 36×28 cm
